home.hero.subtitle: Get instant, AI-curated safety briefings tailored to your specific needs and destination. We analyze local reports so you can explore with confidence.
home.search.label: Where are you going?
home.search.placeholder: e.g. Paharganj, Delhi or Montmartre, Paris
home.error.fetch: Failed to retrieve safety briefing. Please try again.
home.pulse.title: Live Safety Pulse
chat.connectionSecure: Connection secure. Remember to stay in public areas.
briefing.score.title: Overall Risk Score
briefing.score.subtitle: Based on recent verified reports
briefing.scams.title: Active Scams to Watch
briefing.safezones.title: Known Safe Zones
briefing.advice.title: Tailored Travel Advice
briefing.emergency.title: Emergency Contacts
emergency.hero.title: Emergency Hub
emergency.hero.subtitle: Immediate, calm action plans for crisis situations.
emergency.form.landmarks_ph: e.g. A blue pharmacy across the street
emergency.plan.title: Action Plan
scan.hero.title: Scam Scanner
scan.hero.subtitle: Upload a photo of a receipt, taxi meter, or menu to instantly check for common tourist traps.
report.title: Report a Hazard
report.subtitle: Warn others about scams, dangers, or infrastructure issues.
report.success.title: Report Submitted!
report.success.desc: Thank you for helping keep the community safe. Your report will be verified shortly.
connect.auth.title: Secure Connection
connect.auth.subtitle: Sign in to connect with other verified travelers securely.
connect.auth.name: Display Name
connect.loc.title: Set Your Location
connect.loc.subtitle: To find nearby travelers, AegisCircle needs your current location. This is only used to match you with others who opt in — it's never shown to anyone unless you choose to share it.
connect.main.title: Yatri Connect
connect.main.desc: Turning on visibility lets other verified travelers near you send connection requests. Your exact location is never shared until you actively accept and share it in chat.
connect.discover.empty_desc: Make sure your visibility is turned on to see others.
connect.chats.empty_desc: Head to Discover to find nearby travelers.
connect.chats.tap: Tap to view chat and location tools
